reviews.review_text:
We have attended this caravan park over several years. We spent 5 days there 14/5 till 19/5. WOW! My husband and I were blown away with the impressive , improvement of the gardens.
Maria and Anthony went out of their way to help us enjoy Sydney.
Location of this caravan park to the central CBD  is very convenient. A 5 minute walk to the bus and a 7 minute walk to the train station!
We will be return !
Thanks Maria & Anthony!

Not worth $60 a night for a caravan site. Stayed with wifi but only use for 1 hour otherwise you pay $2 an hour. Unbelievable
Not worth it do not come here
No instructions given and no map
Everyone miserable here

Andrew and his wife are such lovely, down to earth people. They went the extra distance to help us get our caravan in which made our trip to Sydney a lot less stressful.

The park itself is well situated, driving distance to the beaches, city and airport.

The facilities are clean and the grounds are very well kept.
Lovely park on Southside of Sydney. Nice people.
Great place to stay over the night friendly staff and quiet family park.

We spent our last week of vanlife at Sheralee Caravan Park, and it couldn’t have been a more special place to end this chapter.

Andrew and Maria are such kind and warm-hearted people – their caring and familiar way of running the park really touched us. You can truly feel how much love and effort they put into this place.

We will definitely keep both the park and them in very good memories. Thank you for making our last days so special 🤍
Elena & Tamara
This is an older park and a little crowded but maintained and cleaned very well. Marie and Andrew (the managers) are Super sweet.

Maria hat uns super geholfen
wir durften über ihren pc unsere Flugtickets drucken,  da wir leider von dem Lufthansastreik betroffen waren
Kathrin & Thomas
Maria and Andrew have been so accommodating and helpful with our stay! The location is brilliant and the facilities are clean and great

The staff are very kind, and the facilities are all clean and well-equipped, including showers, toilets, a kitchen, laundry, and powered sites.
It’s very close to the airport, and there are supermarkets and a train station nearby, making access extremely convenient.
You can also get to central Sydney in just 30 minutes on a direct train, so the location is excellent.

✨Everything is perfect✨

The receptionist obviously didn't like her job.  Rude on arrival. Had 1 hour of wifi for the whole of 3 days. When we questioned it she told us that was the rule. If we wanted any more time we had to pay cash 💲 💵
Maria and Andrew were very nice, we got a  great instruction :) and the Camping place was very quite. We had such lovely neighbours. The Facilities were very clean, we had a great experience. ♡
I was a visitor only

Das war der schlechteste Park, hei dem ich je war. Schon am Telefon klang die Frau bei der Rezeption sehr genervt und unfreundlich, was sich beim Empfang auch bestätigt hat. Zuerst war sie genervt, dass jemand nicht am korrekten Ort zum check in stand, weshalb sie wollte, dass er umsetzt, und zwar nur, damit sie das Dachzelt sehen kann. Uns wurde nicht erklärt wo alles ist, sonder nur gesagt, dass man coins für die Laundry bräuchte. Anschließend wurden wir durch ziemlich enge Wege zum Stellplatz geführt.
Unser Stellplatz war sehr sehr klein. Direkt neben uns waren andere Leute, also Privatsphäre war nicht vorhanden. Man war neben einem Fluss, der teilweise gestunken hat und man hat Müll neben einem langtreiben gesehen. Die Toiletten waren voll ok, aber der Boden in dem Badezimmer war dreckig, die Duschen waren klein, hatten kaum Druck, haben das Badezimmer unter Wasser gesetzt und es hat sehr lange gedauert, bis es warm wurde. Die Camp Küche und nahe Umgebung war voller Kakerlaken. Generell hat man sich in dem Park unwohl gefühlt, weil dort einige Dauercamper waren, die einen ständig beobachtet haben. Das einzige Positive war die gute Lage zu Sydney, die Ruhe und der Aufenthaltsraum, bei dem man seine Geräte laden konnte und es ruhig und trocken war, aber 50 Dollar für so einen Park ist trotzdem eine Frechheit. Das Wlan war nicht gratis.
Great campsite with good location. Maria and Andrew were very nice.

Sheralee is the best camping of our road trip ! We do Melbourne - Brisbane and it’s our 4th camping and the ambiance is the best.

The landlords are really nice and kind, the place is great near the river in the beautiful nature. Thanks for all ! See u
Unsere Stellplatz war zu nahe an der Tür, von jedem der da gewohnt hat. Das positive ist, man ist in einer Stunde in Sydney. Aber das ist auch alles.

Wir hatten eine wundervolle Zeit auf diesem Caravan-Park! Maria und Andrew sind einfach großartige Gastgeber – total lieb, immer hilfsbereit und jederzeit freundlich. Man merkt sofort, dass sie mit Herz dabei sind und sich wirklich um ihre Gäste kümmern.

Auch die Lage ist hervorragend – ruhig, gut erreichbar und das Zentrum ist schnell zu erreichen.

Just got back from 2 nights at Sheralee. Showers were hot, facilities were clean. Good value.

Maria in the office is incredibly nice! Even though we were held up by a truck fire and road works on the Hume Highway, Maria met us with friendliness and warmth, despite us being late. Thanks so much!

We stayed there for some nights while visiting Sydney. The location is very convenient, is the closest campground to city center. The venue is nice, always very clean and plenty of space. Friendly staff and atmosphere and convenient place, recommended!

Es ist sehr ruhig, schön und freundlich. Wir lieben es.

Wenn man in der Nähe der Innenstadt einen gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis für einen Caravan Park sucht, dann ist das perfekt. Der Preis ist fair, die Besitzer sehr freundlich sowie auch alle anderen Gäste. Es ist erstaunlicherweise Ruhig tagsüber und auch nachts, obwohl der Flughafen in der Nähe ist. Wir sind super zufrieden und können es herzlich weiter empfehlen.
Stayed at this campsite for a night, no complaints! Lovely lovely owners and friendly people all around. Close enough to Sydney and great prices! Unpowered and powered sites both great :)

We were a bit sceptical having read some of the reviews but we had a good three night stay here.  The only issue would be just two washing machines and one drier.  Location - an easy walk to Rockdale train station and a direct train into the city. So quick and easy.

We really enjoyed our stay at Sheralee Caravan Park in Sydney. The location is very convenient, with easy access to the city by Uber or train. The campground is very well maintained and pleasant overall. We would especially like to sincerely thank the owners for their kindness and warm welcome. We highly recommend it!

Maria and Andrew were so sweet to me, I had a powered spot for 2 nights and everytime I saw them there was a smile and “how’s it going” it filled my heart to be around a community so happy. 10/10 would reccomend- showers were lovely, stellar water pressure, plenty of space which was appreciated. Laundry/fridge/bbq area was always clean and had a lovely flow to it. Location was great, was able to walk/bus to where I needed to be. Even taking a walk around the camp filled me with joy. You can tell the people who stay long term love it. Prices were perfect for what was needed. Thank you guys for a restful joyful time:)
J'y ai campé 3 nuits et rien à redire, la propriétaire a été adorable, c'est un amour! Vraiment merci pour tout, madame 🥰
Jeg sov her 3 nætter og det var et rigtig rart og roligt sted. Ejerne var helt vildt rare og hjælpsomme. Derudover har stedet en meget god placering i byen i forhold til alternativet

We've been travelling in a van for over a month and we haven't experienced such a friendly and helpful service anywhere else than we did from the couple running the park. They helped us out when we didn't find any other option eventhough they were fully booked. Thanks a lot, you're awesome. We hope to see you again someday.
it is pretty good here
At first, the staff agreed to accept a payment of $10 for dumping grey and black water, but later the reception demanded $40, cash only. Very strange…
Very nice place. Andrew and Maria are so helpfull and sweet. Showers, toilets and BBQ is working perfectly☺️
They managed to squeeze us in on new years with our rootent. Was great to be able to camp in the city for such a great price. Thank you 🙏

Andrew and Maria are lovely people and made sure we had a great stay. On the campground is plenty of space and the location is also very good. There are common areas where you can watch TV, a clean kitchen, and several barbecue areas. The sanitary facilities are clean and there are enough of them. The beach is a 15-minute walk away. We had a very nice time here and would be happy to come back.
Excellent position. Quiet and pleasant place with good service. Recommended.

Management are so friendly and caring and the prices are extremely reasonable. The entire vibe of the place is so chill, and even though you’re close to the airport and everything in the city it is really quiet????? No idea how anyone would rate place this less than 5 stars perhaps they’re expecting a resort from a caravan park lol

Wir sind mit der Erwartung zu dem Campingplatz gekommen wenige Tage zu bleiben, haben uns dann aber doch entschieden länger zu bleiben weil wir so herzlich aufgenommen wurden. Die Betreuer Andrew und Maria waren so hilfsbereit und haben alles dafür getan die Besucher glücklich zu machen.
Auch das Reinigungspersonal ist sehr gründlich und freundlich. Es wurde jeden Tag geputzt und kontrolliert dass alles aufgefüllt ist.
Wir können uns in keinem Punkt beschweren.
Eine Küche, heiße Duschen, ein Tv Raum, ein Waschsalon,… stehen zur Verfügung.
Wir sind 100% zufrieden. Das Preisleistungsverhältnis ist sehr fair.
Als wir gefahren sind wurde wir herzlich verabschiedet.
Vielen Dank an Maria und Andrew!
Es ist uns nicht leicht gefallen nach 1 Monat den Campingplatz zu verlassen.
Clean and nice employees. Also it’s a quiet place and not expensive. Got everything you need, laundry, a kitchen, toilets and showers. Next bus stop to get to cbd is not far away.

What a great place to stay in our motorhome in Sydney. Maria and Andrew are so friendly and helpful and go out of their way to ensure you have a wonderful stay. Amenities are great and the location to Rockdale station is just a 15 to 20 minute walk to take the train to access Sydney and the light rail system.
Thank you for providing such a fantastic park and we look forward to coming back again.

Perfect campsite in the middle of Sydney. You got easy access to trains , who will take you to all the places you want to go, through the nearby train station. You got all the facilities you need, which are also really clean. And the hosts are so lovely and really kind. They look after everyone and are always ready for good recommendations. I really enjoyed my stay and would come back anytime.
Best and most affordable if you want to camp in Sydney. Very friendly staff. Can recommend!

I had an excellent stay at this campsite! The shared areas, including the kitchen and bathrooms, are always spotless, which makes daily life really comfortable. The couple at the reception is absolutely lovely, always friendly, welcoming, and helpful.

The location is a big plus: the campsite is close to the city and public transport, making it very convenient to get around. For a city like Sydney, the price is very reasonable, while still offering a peaceful and pleasant environment.

I highly recommend this campsite, whether for a few days or a longer stay. A truly wonderful find! 🌟

Stayed for one night with our campervan. Very friendly managers of the campground. Called that we were not able to get there in time, for which they were so kind to stay open for us a little longer. Good facilities. Had a quite night rest here.
You get the best price for a site that is next to the airport and the city center. Especially the couple at the reception helped us a lot. They are extremly welcoming and friendly! :)

We did last minute booking and they were very friendly and accommodating.
Clean facilities and close to beach, shopping center and St George Hospital.
Great quiet place to stay. Friendly and helpful staff, plenty of clean and neat amenities. Definately stay there again.

Wir haben den Platz gewählt weil er für die Abgabe unseres Campers am folgenden Tag ideal gelegen ist. Den nahe gelegenen Flugplatz kann man gut überhören. Die Stellplätze werden der Grösse des Gefährts entsprechend persönlich zugewiesen. Maria und Andrew sind mit viel Herzlichkeit an der Arbeit. Vielen Dank!

Such a friendly place! Maria and Andrew are really warm people with everyone. The toilets, kitchen and laundry are well maintained. Is really quiet, despite the noise of the airport..
Good experience for only $40 bucks p night

Ein netter kleiner Campingplatz am Rande von Sydney, ideal um die Stadt zu erkunden. Mit Bus und Bahn gut angeschlossen, 15-20 Minuten Fußweg entfernt Geschäfte und Restaurants sowie ein Strand.
Mary und Andrew sind seit Oktober die neuen Pächter und mit Herzblut dabei. Gerne helfen sie und freuen sich über ein kurzes Gespräch und Tipps für andere Gäste. Sie halten alles sehr sauber. Die Anlage ist nicht sehr groß, die Plätze sind eher klein, aber alles was man braucht ist da. Und ehrlich - wer braucht einen Pool, wenn es so viel zu entdecken gibt?
Mit Wohnmobil, 2 Personen, Strom, Wasser und Abwasser bezahlen wir 50$ pro Nacht. Leider kann man (noch) nicht online buchen. Am besten telefonisch anfragen.
I came in a camper my last night of my trip and the wonderful staff squeezed me in last minute. Nice facilities and friendly people. I recommend Sheralee!

Reserveren vooraf is aan te raden. Gelukkig hebben de beheerders nog een plekje voor ons kunnen vinden. De toiletten zijn schoon, er is een kookgelegenheid.
Er zijn ook vaste plekken zo te zien.
Voor ons voldoet het prima, kwartje lopen naar de metro, half uur lopen naar het strand.
Maria and Andrew are incredible hosts. They are super helpful and radiates with good energy. The park is really close to the station. The amenities are clean and nice! I really recommend!

We stayed here for 2 nights and location, location, location.  Yes it is a bit outdated but the bathrooms/showers, Kitchen and laundry area were all clean and in good working condition.

Our site had a cut lawn, water, power and grey water drain. Also had a dump station close by.

Shirin (sorry for the spelling) was great and we got checked in quickly and she even took us right to our site.

Wifi I can see for people is a pain as only 1 free hour and $2 after. We didn't need it so no worries.

Thank you guys so much for your accomodation! I’ll be back 100%
Plane spotting was unreal!! 👀✈️

Really enjoying our stay here. Maria and Andrew are incredible, always happy to help and make sure all guests are happy and comfortable. Guided us in to our site and offer a tour around to show you amenities and other facilities. The park is in a great spot, close to shops, train station, beach
Exceeded my expectations and great for the price. 2 week Max stay, a lot of rental vans coming and going but a few holiday goers.

Lots of on-site/permanent residents on the other side of the park, who are all friendly and chat as we walk by with our daughter.
Would absolutely recommend this and will stay again in future when we need to visit sydney.

Andrew and Maria are very friendly and helpful people and provide excellent service. They only just started in October, so you can ignore any previous ratings.

We booked for 1 night and have already extended up to 4, might stay even a couple more. We really felt helped at all times.
The location is also nice, since beach, shopping and train station are all within 15 min walk

Unser Camperstellplatz war klein, aber wir brauchten nur einen Ausgangsort um Sydney zu erkunden und dafür war er sehr gut geeignet. Preis/Leistung sehr gut.
Die Betreiber Maria und Andrew super nett und hilfsbereit. 15 Min. Fussweg zur Bahnstation, von da perfekte Anbindung zur City.

Great campsite!
We were very happy with the friendliness of the staff, the cleanliness, and the proximity to the city.
Highly recommended!

Der Campingplatz liegt 15-20 Gehminuten von der Train Station "Rockdale" entfernt und damit sehr günstig für Ausflüge ins Zentrum von Sydney. Eine Bushaltestelle liegt noch näher. Das war für uns der Grund für die Auswahl.
Wenn man den ganzen Tag in Sydney verbringt stört weder der Lärm v. Flughafen noch der von der Baustelle.
Ansonsten sind die Plätze recht klein, aber ausreichend und mit Strom/Wasser ausgestattet.
Waschräume und Toiletten sind sauber und mit heißem Wasser.
Der Service der asiatischen Dame ist reserviert aber korrekt. Etwas mehr Freundlichkeit würde allen gut tun.

Me and my boyfriend stayed in our camper van at the park for a total of  9 nights and really enjoyed our stay. All the facilities were amazing (kitchen, bathrooms, outdoor space, tv room etc.) so many nice places to chill out whilst at the campsite. Maria and Andrew were spectacular also, always went above and beyond to make sure we felt comfortable and enjoyed our stay, out of our 6 weeks travelling this was 100% the best service we had, even let us pick from a few different sites to see which one suited us best which made us feel great about the place. Location was fantastic too enjoyed being close to the city but not in it. We mostly drove into Sydney (Cbd and eastern suburbs) as there is some free parking around coogge etc. but we also got the train a couple times which is around a 25 min walk from the accommodation and takes roughly 30-40 mins to get into the Cbd. Over all I can't recommend this place anymore, I also never tend to leave reviews but felt it was necessary for this place as we enjoyed the service so much! Thanks again Maria and Andrew.

Great location close to centre of Sydney. We stayed here to go to a concert and were impressed by the bathroom facilities which were clean and even had a plug socket. It was quiet and suited us for this 1 night stay. Only feedback would be that the reception member wasn’t particularly friendly

Perfect Location. Close to CBD. Maria and Andy have been very friendly and helped us with a spot last minute. We were aware of the bad rating before but we can't complain. Restrooms clean, and we felt very safe. We even left the door of our van open accidentally and left for a few hours with all the belongings in the car 😅 nothing had happend. Also quite during the night. It's not noisy while being close to the airport. We can recommend if u wanna see Sydney Central 👌🏼

Sind heute für eine Nacht bei Maria und ihrem Ehemann. Sie haben ganz neu übernommen und arbeiten hier mit ganzem Herz. Wir sind morgens angekommen und aie waren sehr bemüht uns noch einen Stellplatz zu geben. Ganz tolle, familiäre Anlage. Sogar einen Plan und Tipps für Sydney haben wir bekommen. Danke für Alles! Nur zu empfehlen.🤍

Heel vriendelijk mensen. Ze helpen je overal mee als je het vraagt. Douche en toiletruimte erg schoon. Mooie locatie vooral dicht bij het vliegveld, 20 minuten. Vlakbij het station maar 15 minuten lopen en met 15 minuten zit je in het centrum van sydney. Supermarkt zit ook vlakbij. Als je naar sydney komt zou ik deze zeker aanbevelen vooral als je richting Melbourne gaat.

Stopped here for an event in Sydney and stayed an extra night. Hosts were fantastic throughout our stay here. Would recommend if looking to stay in the Sydney area. Public transport was the best option as moving the motorhome each day coupled with parking in the city would have been a nightmare. Will stop here again if in Sydney.

Probably best place to visit Sydney if you have a van. 40$ per night per vehicle unpowered site. Very clean and well kept. 1 hour with public transport from Circular quay. Also laundry (4$ per load both washing machine and dryer)
Great Caravan Park. We were here twice with our Rooftoptent and it was wonderful. The staff is extremly friendly and everything is clean. Definitely coming back when in Sydney again!

Great spot for backpackers! We’ve stayed here twice and will definitely be back. Clean, spacious sites, super friendly staff, and a super convenient location just a short walk from the train station. Relaxing, social vibe – perfect base for exploring Sydney. Highly recommended!

Arrived late on Monday night to this caravan park not expecting there to be any space for us. Spoke to Maria at the office and she couldn't have been more helpful! She walked us through the amenities and gave us a thorough tour of the site. We were able to park along the waterfront in a lovely spot and went out for food at a place Maria recommended.

Brilliant service, brilliant place to spend a night. Highly recommend this place!

Never mind the one stars. Maria and Andrew are great hosts and very accommodating. The accommodates our change of plans (delayed our arrival by a day and also extended our stay. Decent facilities, good location to get into inner Sydney and quiet safe area. Recommend.

Great location near to Rockdale - 10 mins walk.
Very friendly staff. $50 per night for caravan parking.

It was a very pleasant stay. The sanitary facilities were clean, and both the kitchens and the laundry room were very well equipped. Andrew and Maria were also extremely kind and always helped us whenever there were any issues. The location was perfect – the supermarket was only a 10-minute drive away, and the train connections could be reached in less than a 15-minute walk, with a direct line to Sydney. We felt very comfortable at the small campsite, which had a warm and family-like atmosphere.

The host Marie and Andy are super friendly and helpful. The site is quiet and clean , local to Sydney this is helpful as there is no parking in Sydney for campervans.
Can’t go wrong for the price.
Thanks guys and we wish you well for the future.
Sue and Chris.
Lovely place to stay when driving a campervan through sydney. Toilets and showers clean. New management were lovely!

We’ve been camping all around Australia for the past two years, but we’ve never felt as welcome and comfortable as we did here. From the moment we arrived, Maria and Andrew greeted us with such kindness and warmth — they truly made us feel at home.

Everything about this place is perfect: spotless bathrooms, an immaculate kitchen, hot showers, washing machines and dryers in great condition, and a peaceful atmosphere where everyone is friendly and respectful. Even the garden is beautifully maintained and adds such a calm, cozy touch.

It’s rare to meet people as genuine and caring as Maria and Andrew. Their hospitality goes above and beyond — they’re not just hosts, they’re truly special people.

We recommend this place from the heart. If you’re looking for somewhere to feel at home while traveling, this is it.
Very helpful new managers Maria and Andrew were extremely helpful and doing a great job around the park.

The staff are so rude and the services not worth the price. We were told there was a dryer in the laundry and there wasn’t. No wifi and no vending machine.
We had a spot for a week. No outdoor green mat like the other RV sites but they came and asked us to clean the mat of a neighbouring van because our children were playing there. A lot of retired people who are there permanently staring every time we exit and enter our RV and also very rude. One woman told me I was a bad mother because I wouldn’t let my children accept the plastic collectibles from the supermarket that she was trying to offload on us while we were in the middle of dinner.
Terrible shower pressure and sensor lights mean you’re in there three minutes before it goes pitch black.
25 minutes walk in to the supermarket so it’s a difficult location

As a site not worth what you pay, but given it's Sydney not bad price for what it is. Mainly used Sheralee to park campervan and visit old friends. It's very expensive and difficult to park close to CBD so in that respect it was good. Stayed 3 nights. Wandered around a little bit but never found advertised camp kitchen or vending machine, though they may be there. Wifi doesn't work. Sites are very short for campervan, if I wanted to open barn doors would have had to park nose out in access road. A few women complained showers were at best tepid, rapidly going cold, the men's were okay. If you don't have high expectations the place is alright.
Can’t get better services from Mark

You can't book for an unpowered site in the first place. So far so good. But they said we could move to one if there is space, but when we arrived there the rude staff just gave us a powered site even though there was plenty of space. Whenever I said something to find an agreement she played dumb. In the end we couldn't move, because we dropped it, but magically the people after us had the same problem, but because they were more furious they could. All in all was the staff so unpleasant, that there was an immediate dislike even if it's just a random camping Site. Just don't go there

Super guter Canpingplatz für Sydney. Die Nacht kostet mit Strom 50 AUD. Man kann mit dem Zug, Bus oder Metro die Stadt erkunden. Die Station ist nach 20 Minuten zu Fuß erreichbar. Ein kleiner feiner Platz neben einer Sportanlage für Netball und Rugby. Es ist alles vorhanden.
Perfect Service, Friendly! We had enough space- it was quiet, clean! Just a perfect stay. Price was Good. Thank you!! 😊🙏🏼
Klein park wel genoeg ruimte voor caravans. Aardige medewerkster.

Wir sind im Australischen Winter hier gewesen (Juli) und der Platz war recht leer dadurch hatten wir ausreichend Platz. Wir standen sehr schön. Der Platz liegt direkt an einem Fluss. Die Dame war sehr nett. Wir sind vom Platz in 20 Minuten mit Uber in die Stadt zum Circular Quay gefahren.
Die Sanitäranlage war sauber und in einem guten Zustand.

My overnight stay at this park was amazing. The hosts are very friendly and helpful. The sites are large enough for my 7 mtr motorhome and still more to spare.
I loved the overnight stay and the price for this location was very reasonable. I would definitely recommend this park if going through Sydney .

We parked up in a camper twice. First time we were told we would not be charged for our 11yr old son and second time charged for my son and when questioned said big bosses were coming to check the books. No wifi as it states on the website. No vending machines. And facilities dont look as they do in the pictures. Disappointing.
The lady at the front desk was super nice the site r a good size for the price

Me and my girlfriend have rented a self contained RV and wanted somewhere near a station to get into the city easily and this site was great. Felt very secure here and the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful. The toilets and showers they have onsite are great. They have lots of electrical points as well as water taps and dumps for your grey hoses. Also a dump point with hose for your toilet cassette. Would recommend this park 100% and happily stay here again.

Firstly, Ignore any negative comments you might read about Sheralee Tourist Caravan Park! Specifically, this park is just as secure and safe as any other.
This is a lovely (yes, a little old) caravan park. But you get exactly what you  need from a tidy and well run park that is so close to Sydney city.
For the price, I have stayed at many other places that offer much less.
It's clean, neat, has both a small and large kitchen area, lounge room with TV and great hot water showers. Unlike many other parks, the toilets and showers are cleaned well and frequently.
Appliances in the kitchens as well as the BBQ all work and are in good condition.
There are lots of powered sites which can be booked in advance but only a few unpowered sites. If you need an unpowered site, you cannot book and are allocated on who arrives first....so if you arrive late in the afternoon, be warned, there might not be space (but you can always pay a few extra $ and get a powered sites for the night.
I highly recommend!!
Staff were great understanding we had a big drive

05–06/2025

For a campground in Sydney, this place is incredibly affordable. We stayed on an unpowered site in a tent for just $40 per night.

Overall impression:
Great location — around 15 minutes’ walk to the nearest station and close to the airport.

Facilities:
The kitchen is well-equipped with gas stoves, ovens, microwaves, fridges, kettles, and toasters.
There are plenty of indoor and outdoor areas around the kitchen to sit, rest, or eat.
Toilets and showers are abundant, but many have weak water pressure, lukewarm water, or overly high water-saving taps that are hard to use — especially for shorter people. Some showers also operate on a 5-minute timer, which feels very rushed if you don’t shower quickly.

Laundry:
Laundry facilities are solid — washers and dryers operate on $1 coins (around $4 per cycle). Wash time is about 35 minutes, and there’s a good amount of space for air-drying clothes.

Cleanliness:
The amenities are cleaned daily. However, if someone is using the facilities during the cleaning time, staff tend to skip cleaning that area — which raises the question: what if that happens every day?

One downside:
Although we stayed in a tent, staff still asked us to move our tent because the grass underneath was “dying.” We understand this kind of policy for caravans or campervans, but relocating a whole tent setup — with gear — is not easy and felt a bit unreasonable.

Note for unpowered site users:
The soil is extremely loose — whether it’s dry or wet — so it’s difficult to secure tent pegs properly. If you’re near the small gate area, the ground is also noticeably sloped, and you may find yourself rolling around while sleeping.

As winter approaches, the lukewarm water becomes a real issue for people who shower at night — you’ll be shivering while trying to clean up. There’s no heat lamp in the bathrooms either, making showers quite unpleasant in cold weather.

In summary:
If you’re not staying during winter, this could be a very comfortable and affordable spot. Just be aware that over 80% of the residents here are permanent, so the park feels more like a small local community than a traditional campground.

Franchement rien à redire. Marc et Marguareth sont des hôtes charmants. Nous avons adoré y séjourner. Nous y sommes passés deux fois en coup de vent pour se doucher et faire nos lessives . Nous y avons été accueillis comme si nous y passions la nuit sans avoir à payer. Nous y avons également passé deux nuits sur site où nous avons fait de belles rencontres. Les prix sont correct et le camping est idéalement situé si vous souhaitez visiter Sydney.
Les douches/toilettes sont nickels. Cuisine au top. Je recommande vivement
The managers for this caravan park are friendly, try to please and treat you like family. Great people.

Call themselves a Caravan Park but 22' caravan is too long?
Lady who answered the phone was just rude!

Very welcoming staff,,,,all the needs there for my campervan stay,,,,,,bathroom areas are keeped clean,,,laundry room ologyis great,,,cooking vacilities are great for my needs,,,very close to Sydney and many attractions,,,,,powered sites are great,,,,,thank you to the caravan tourist park.....
Very good location, close to airport, train to city,quiet, nice clean toilets, clean kitchen with all pans/pots/spices.Staying week

At the campsite in Sydney, we stayed for 40$ a night unpowered. Not big spaces but that is alright as you only stay here when you are going to explore Sydney. 15/20 minute walk in a straight line to the station. 30/40 minutes with the train to the city centre. 2 toilet blocks, hot showers and enough washing machines. Recommend it to stay here if you have a car/motorhome and want to explore Sydney.

We stayed 3 nights to explore Sydney. We asked for a site away from other dogs or at the very end because we had trouble with on of our dogs who got recently attacked. The receptionist gave us a good spot for my pup at the very end so I’m thankful for that! But I overheard another receptionist talking very rude to other customers who couldn’t figure out how to open their rooftop tent on their unpowered site because of the very small sites so they had tu upgrade to power and we arrived after the Easter holidays but still had to pay holidays prices so I’m sorry for them. The amenities where quit dirty and the motion detector in one of the women showers doesn’t work - I learned that the hard way had no light half way through my shower very uncomfortable. WiFi is not really available you get 1 coupon for only one device for 1 h for free after that you have to pay for every other hour. We payed 60$ per night you should think you’ll get WiFi there but I wasn’t working on our site anyways just close to the reception. And the powered sites are very small as well as far as I could see all sites are very small but that might be due to the location. There is a off leash beach very close by and you’re very close to the centrum so that’s a plus.
We had trouble getting in and out too small for our 18ft caravan paid for a drive through and didn't get it
camping is outdated, though affordable for such a great location. 20min walk to tram station.

Der Campingplatz wird besucht wenn man die Stadt sehen möchte. Und genau dafür ist er perfekt. Die Plätze sind klein, aber die Einrichtungen alle sauber und der Service nett. Man geht 15 Minuten zur nächsten Haltestelle und fährt mit dem T3 in die Stadt. Das funktioniert alles reibungslos und genau das wollten wir. Für einen Besuch von Sydney genau richtig.

We stayed to nights in our 6 berth motorhome. We received great help to find a spot large enough to park the motorhome. The public transport into CBD was good, even until late at night. The toilets and stay
showers were clean and good. Thank you for letting us stay here!

I made a reservation inquiry by email and phone, but the male staff member was not very friendly, which made me feel sad. I guess it's my fault for not being good at English. I couldn't hear what they said on the phone, so even when I asked by email, the reply was slow and not very friendly. I felt sad.

Deze camping bezochten we omdat we dichtbij de luchthaven moesten zijn om iemand van een vroege vlucht op te halen. Dit is meteen het enige voordeel van deze camping, die je eigenlijk geen camping kunt noemen. Het is een veredelde parkeerplek voor je camper met per plaats zo weinig ruimte dat we niet eens onze luifel konnen uitrollen. De beheerder probeerde ons in eerste instantie op een plaats te zetten bij het toiletgebouw waar het ook nog vies was en er etensresten lagen. Deze camping is alleen een verdienmodel, we betaalden 50 dollar voor een plaats zonder stroom. Een volgende keer zouden we liever iets verder rijden dan nog een keer hier verblijven, verschrikkelijk.

Nice caravan park. Lots of different size sites to suit smaller set ups. Plenty of grass and location is perfect. Simple check in process and well priced.|Ablution blocks clean and tidy. Laundry on site but did not use.|Two camp kitchens with everything you would need, also nice and clean.|Everybody friendly and all patrons were nice and quiet.|Will definitely start here again.|Thanks

We stayed on a powered site for 3 nights and it was the perfect location for visiting Sydney! 20 minutes walk in a pretty much straight line to the train station then a quick train into the city. Clean toilets, good access to laundry services too, they even had laundry detergent for us to use.
The owner said I can bring my cat in my own tent/van

small caravan park but great staff. the young lady gave us excellent information about the park and transportation. she even helped my wife download the app for train timetable. big help. we will definitely return here on our next holiday in Sydney
Good caravan park. Very crumpled together and rude staff. The toilette are good and it's just 1h away from the city center with the bus

We were very disappointed with this campground. The place is pretty worn down and the standards are very poor compared to the prices. We got a super small spot which didn’t allow us to use our awning, so we had to ask for a bigger site and even though there was plenty of space we had to pay for a powered site even if we didn’t need one, and not even then were we able to use our awning due to the small amount of space between sites. The owner is pretty unpleasant as well and walks around with a check list every morning to make sure you leave on time. There’s no gate so whoever can come into the campground. COULD have accepted it if it was a bit cheaper but the prices are ridiculous compared to what you get. Would not recommend.

The Managers Margaret & Mark are very nice people to deal with, they are extremely helpful to guest & happily supply local area maps for nearby public transport and shopping centres.
The Park is fairly restricted to the amount of visitors it can fit in due to full-time residency.
The amenities are excellent & very clean. The park is reasonably quiet which was surprising for the location near busy roads & the Sydney airport.

Ist es der Schönste Campingplatz?
Nein aber..

Der Campingplatz ist günstig.

Gut gelegen um nach Sydney (Innenstadt) mit der Bahn zu fahren
Oder zum Flughafen. Es ist sehr sauber.  Gut geführt und die Leiter und das Personal sind wie sehr häufig in Australien überaus freundlich.
Die Waschmaschine sind sind ebenfalls Clean und kosten nur 4$.

Eine Absolute Empfehlung und ich weiß nicht woher die Durchschnittliche Bewertungen kommen.

I have stayed here a few times now and although my first visit had a water pipe hiccup (totally my fault), the park is great. It's quiet and in a great location. I don't think they do cabins but I won't go anywhere else with my motorhome now I've found this place.
good campground, and cheap for it’s  location. walking distance to restaurants and easy to get to the city by train. facilities were clean and staff were friendly :)

This is the worst campground I have been to in the last 6 weeks. It's not even really a campground, it's an overcrowded car park where the pitches are smaller than the campervans. So all the vans reach into the small road. The facilities are worn out and old. So no chance to have a shower. There is no Wifi. The distance between the campervans is about 2.5m, so there is only room for one table. So every other caravan can use it's table. There is no security, so anyone can come and go as they please. So parking on the street is probably the safer option. The 'nearest' trains are a twenty minute walk through very empty streets, not the best idea if you are coming home after dark.

Quite easily the most obnoxious, rude 'managers', I have ever encountered in over 40 years of travelling!
Cannot pay by card apparently, only cash, hmm
Asked them to show us the powered site they pointed vaguely at, literally only 20m away, but clearly on a steep slope,  and that short walk was just way too much trouble for them apparently 😳 😄
So we walked...away!
Avoid!

Very modern and clean amenities. Friendly staff guiding you to your site. Good location to use the public transport 5 min walk to the bus and 20 min walk to the train station.
40$ unpowered site.
For Sydney a great Caravan Park for a fair price.
Clean amenities, friendly staff. Stayed in a camper so unsure of rooms.
Nice caravan park. Thank you for the hospitality

Sheralee Tourist Caravan Park was a winner for us,having a big RV,and needing to head to Sydney Airport early morning ,they allowed us to stay hitched and spread across 2 sites making for an effortless departure the next morning. A short stroll down to the busy beach precinct 🏖️ for dinner and a stroll home to a quiet, peaceful night.
We will definitely be making Sheralee Caravan Park our preferred stop when in Sydney. Only 10 minutes to the airport and 10 minutes to downtown CBD ✈️
Great hosts ,friendly and helpful.The place is deceivingly large having a community of permanents that take pride in their homes, very picturesque place to be 😉
Its ok.

Made a booking, paid in advance, at the last minute they cancelled my booking without giving any reasons, it was not like a site had been doubled booked. Still waiting on a refund. If you would prefer not having a similar experience as mine, then I would recommend finding some other caravan park to stay at.

Ist okay, nah an der City. 20 Gehminuten zum Bahnhof, 20 Gehminuten zum Einkaufen. Platz müsste renoviert werden, wie auch die sanitären Anlagen. Für Sydney sehr günstig! Also stimmt das Preis/Leistungsverhältnis.
Really scraping  the bottom of the barrel

Close to work, close to Sydney's CBD, 15 minute walk to the station, cheap, clean, & quiet, what else could you ask for? Oh yeah the owners were very accommodating! I will definitely recommend this place to friends and family and I will be back during future trips to Sydney! Thank you :)

Not bad close to airport.
Nice locals.
Frechheit! Auf unsere Anfrage kam keine Antwort per Mail und beim Telefonat eine Woche später wurden wir unfreundlich abgewiesen.

Good caravan park that was actually close to city centre - only issue I would say is the spacing is not that good between perm residents and the day to day goers but nevertheless saying that the perm resident we met was lovely :)

Person organising where people should go seemed a bit panicked and was saying she didn’t have any space but managed to slot us in which was fine.

Toilets were clean but the cleaning times for them was a bit odd kind of in the morning when everyone was going to get ready to go out? Should maybe do it at lunchtime where less people want showers/toilet.

Had to shower in the disabled toilet.

Around a 15 min walk to the train and then a 15 min train to town so very close.

Trains cheap aswell only around a $1

Campsite for 2 No. Pax was $40
Die Plätze sind zu klein, die Aussicht war nicht schön, da diese auf eine grosse laute Baustelle fiel und die Toiletten und Duschen waren alt. Wir haben deshalb nur eine Nacht dort verbracht.

Goede camping redelijk dichtbij de stad. Douche voorzieningen zijn goed voor elkaar. De eigenaar zou ik adviseren de camping gezelliger te maken door meer bomen, heggen en planten te plaatsen. Het is nu best kaal.

Great stay at this campsite during the Easter weekend.
Top notch welcome. The lady at reception gave us a map showing us the nearest beach, how to easily get to the train station to reach the city center of Sydney...
We slept in our own roof tent, so I didn't experience the camping accommodations.

The bathrooms are super clean and large, as well as the kitchen and the rest room.

The prices are also reasonable.

Excellent Van accommodation not far from Sydney CBD.  Margaret and Mark (Hosts) were extremely obliging with advice and tips to make our holiday more memorable.  Very clean bathroom and facilities,  all other guests were friendly and welcoming.  Being so close to everything in Sydney, the rates were unbeatable.  Good old fashioned park!  We will always use Sheralee when in Sydney.

Wir waren mit unserem Aufenthalt auf diesem Campingplatz voll zufrieden. Natürlich ist er nicht sehr "idyllisch", aber das hatten wir auch bei einem stadtnahen Campingplatz nicht erwartet. Er ist für einen Ausflug in die Stadt einfach perfekt. Die Inhaberin war sehr freundlich und hat uns den Weg zum Bahnhof beschrieben. WC und Dusche waren sauber. Wir würden diesen Platz wieder wählen.
The owner of these campingplace is really unfriendly to the customers.

The location of site is perfect for visiting the city. Public transport is within walking distance. Showers clean and hot. Kitchen was ideal and good seating areas inside and out. All clean, so long as visitors tidy after themselves.
Reception lady was extremely helpful with suggestions on city for time we had and provided maps.
Price was good for city location

This park’s location is perfect for exploring Sydney. ||Best of all, the loveliest lady, Margaret checked us in and she had so many great tips about where to go, what to see and how to get there! ||The facilities were clean and comfortable. We actually ended up staying an extra 4 days because we were happy with the site  & fantastic service.

Bardzo niemiła i pazerna obsługa. Przy wjeżdzie wymusiła na nas opłatę po 50 dolców za noc mimo iż prosiłem o miejsce bez energii elektrycznej i takie były wolne . Wskazała nam krzywe przekopane miejsce choć były wolne z dywanikiem ze sztucznej trawy. Lokalizacja transportowo kiepska
Modern and sophisticated amenities but never been cleaned till i complained. Plumber installed huge toilets when you sit on it your feet don't reach floors unless you are tall  no good for kids

Paying $40 just for dumping seems unreasonable, and the aggressive behavior from the lady adds to the concern. It's peculiar that the cash-only policy applies only to dumping, while card payments are accepted for overnight stays. This distinction raises questions about transparency.
40$ for dumping is a joke! Especially the lady is so aggressive. Also only cash if you want to dump which is kind of suspicious…

The best about this site is it’s location. Great to explore Sydney from thanks to the good public transport access. The park is clean withe good facilities. The Campervan sites are a bit small and there is no shade. But we came for the city and not nature so it was all good. Staff is friendly. There is practically no WiFi.

I ve made a keratin treatment, I have curly thin hair
No damage to my hair, it s perfect and soft
Marc is a really nice man!!
Thank for all

Great location to park a campervan in the middle of the Sydney city. We travelled from Byron to Sydney and were arriving late but the team at sheralee were very kind to stay open late to allow us to check in. Very helpful giving us some tips and tricks to see the city. Nice facilities also.
Would recommend this place.

Friendly staff, clean and plenty amenities. Perfect for a few days Sydney, walk 15/20 minutes to Rockdale station and the train drops you in the city center straightaway. Yes the camping spaces are a bit tight, but is this a big issue? To us: not at all.

A good place to stop if you want to go into Sydney central. Just a 20 min train ride and station a 20 min walk. The facilities were clean and up to date. The people nice. It's just cramped and a bit noisy. I thought overpriced too but you'll not find to much more in the area.

We stayed here while managed by Mark and Margaret and cannot fault the park or their service. Very generous hosts, great sites, super clean park and amenities. They provide Wonderful recommendations for site seeing for tourists. Close to train stations to get into the city and beach close by with many cafes and a weekend market. You will have everything you need here!
most unhelpful lady I’ve ever spoken to.

Short Q & A.
Amenities ✅clean as.
Staff✅ Friendly, consistent.
Tv and phone reception ✅. 5 & 4G.
Park WIFI. ✖️. None at the moment.
Pricing✅. $45-$50 powered site. Seasonal. But good price for 1 or two nights.
Patrons✔️. Very helpful if you need a hand.
Children, didn’t see any✅.
Sites.✔️ Kinda tight, so be prepared for a bit of mucking about to park a caravan. 21 ft is about the limit, and car must be detached, but easy enough.

Overall- a good close to everything spot for a rest layover.
Rating = 7.5 / 10.
The owner is very nice, so take it easy on her, she’s had a rough last couple of years.

Perfect location for exploring sydney. Small park, facilities very clean and staff very welcoming. At the moment construction along boundary fence so a bit noisy. Will be coming back for sure. Easy walk to beach, restuarants, supermarkets and public transport.

Convenient park. However sites are varied in size  Probably best suited to motor homes. As per image there was not room to properly extend our awning and each day we had to park our car in different places because of people around us. There were caravan sized sites with room to put out awning and park cars but despite booking for a week we didn't get one. Best enquire when booking. People running park very friendly.
It was a pit stop to be on the right side of Sydney for Victoria very small would not be a holiday site

Would not recommend this caravan park!Paid $38 for an unpowered site, the first site we were put on we we’re told we would fit & we’re overhanging on the road.

Second site we we’re told to cram in as there were potentially another 4 campers staying in the same area which was the size of 2 standard sites.

When we said we weren’t happy to do so we were told what do we expect when paying for a cheap unpowered site.

Overall the caravan park was very outdated & was not happy with the service. We only stayed & settled for a very average site as we had already paid before seeing the site & were no refunds.
